zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Stanhope於1470年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾藍普頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Stanhope van Rampton25歲，母親Mary Jerningham23歲。他於1500年與Adelyne Clifton在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1512年6月6日在英國享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Stanhope于1470年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾藍普頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Stanhope van Rampton25岁，母亲Mary Jerningham23岁。他于1500年与Adelyne Clifton在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1512年6月6日在英国享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanhope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Stanhope (Durham), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + hop ‘valley’.

History: A family of this name have held the title Earl of Harrington since 1742, and were Earls of Chesterfield from 1628–1967. Philip Stanhope, 1st Earl of Chesterfield, was a Royalist soldier in the English Civil War. He was captured in 1643 and died in prison in 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Stanhope was born in 1470, in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Stanhope van Rampton, was 25 and his mother, Mary Jerningham, was 23. He married Adelyne Clifton in 1500, in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 6 June 1512, in England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Stanhope est né en 1470, à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Stanhope van Rampton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Jerningham, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Adelyne Clifton en 1500, à Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1512, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Stanhope 1470 in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Stanhope van Rampton 25 und seine Mutter Mary Jerningham 23. Er hat 1500 in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Adelyne Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. Juni 1512 im Alter von 42 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Stanhope è nato il nel 1470 nel Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Stanhope van Rampton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mary Jerningham, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Adelyne Clifton nel 1500, nel Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 giugno 1512, nel England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Stanhopeが1470年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Stanhope van Ramptonは25歳，母Mary Jerninghamは23歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアシェルフォードでAdelyne Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1512年6月6日にイギリスで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Stanhope(이)가 1470년 영국 노틴그함실르 램프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Stanhope van Rampton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Jerningham(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 셸퍼드에서 Adelyne Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1512년 6월 6일 영국에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Adelyne Clifton em 1500, em Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Stanhope родился в 1470 г. в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Stanhope van Rampton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Jerningham, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelyne Clifton в 1500 г. в местности шелфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 июня 1512 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Stanhope nació en 1470, en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Stanhope van Rampton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Jerningham, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Adelyne Clifton en 1500, en Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de junio de 1512, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
